Ten Pass 3 JSON files confirmed present: Batch_2_Pass_3.json, Batch_3_Pass_3.json, Batch_4_Pass_3.json, Batch_5_Pass_3.json, Batch_6_Pass_3.json, Batch_7_Pass_3.json (all in multi_llm_research/), plus four topic-grouped standalone Pass 3 files: cbc_hematology_pass_3.json, thyroid_antibodies_pass_3.json, lipid_derived_pass_3.json, transferrin_pass_3.json. Content verified via direct read of Batch_7_Pass_3.json (investigation_spec_contract_version: '3.0.0', spec_id: inv_neutrophils_high_acute_bacterial_inflammatory_response, with full hypotheses, supporting_markers, root_cause, WHY blocks) and cbc_hematology_pass_3.json (spec_id: inv_mch_low_iron_restricted_erythropoiesis, same v3.0.0 schema). Also present: knowledge_bus/research/medical_knowledge_ingestion/Medical_Knowledge_Investigation_3rd_Pass.md (third-pass authoring methodology). CONFIRMED. knowledge_bus/research/investigation_specs/_translation_tracker.yaml read in full (136 lines). Contains 30 entries, all status: 'tested', all with pkg_s24_* package_id. These 30 inv_*.yaml files are the individual investigation-spec YAML assets derived from batches (not the same files as the JSON Pass 3 batches). Every inv_*.yaml spec file in investigation_specs/ has a corresponding translated and tested pkg_s24_* package. This means the YAML-format single-spec corpus is fully promoted via KB-S24. The Pass 3 JSON batch files (Batch_N_Pass_3.json and topic files) are the upstream multi-signal research objects — the promotion status of their contents relative to the pkg_s24_* and compiled card estate is the core question P1-9 must map.

CONFIRMED. docs/sprints/beta_readiness/P1-7_research_to_runtime_readiness_matrix.yaml read (first 40 lines). Confirmed: estate_finding = 'research-rich but unevenly promoted; governance and scoring architecture blockers recur'. ready_count: 4, near_ready_count: 4, blocked_count: 5, unknown_count: 1. P1-7 used compiled estate and runtime surfaces as the comparison axis; P1-9 must now inspect the upstream Pass 3 JSON corpus directly and map those signals against the same runtime surfaces. P1-7 already confirmed pass3_spec_support: Partial for cardiovascular — the P1-9 sprint will quantify what 'Partial' means at the source level.

No duplicate SSOT for research corpus. The investigation-spec-collection-batch*.json files (batch1-10 through batch51-56) in investigation_specs/ are separate collected-batch compilation artefacts distinct from the multi_llm_research Pass 3 files — Cursor must treat them as a separate corpus layer and not conflate them with true Pass 3 material unless content inspection confirms Pass 3 content inside.

CONFIRMED. The true Pass 3 corpus in multi_llm_research/ consists of 10 JSON files (6 batch-format + 4 topic-grouped). The investigation-spec-collection-batch*.json files (6 batch collections covering specs 1–56) in the parent investigation_specs/ directory use a different naming pattern and are a separate artefact layer — these appear to be structured compilation inputs, not Pass 3 research authoring output. Cursor must distinguish these two layers in the corpus discovery section and explicitly report: (1) paths of true Pass 3 files inspected, (2) whether batch-collection files were also inspected and what they contain, (3) any Pass 3 content that appears in both layers. Filename-only inference is explicitly prohibited by the prompt and must not substitute for content inspection.

changes.finding: CONFIRMED. P1-7 established that pass3_spec_support is 'Partial' for several launch-core domains, and the translation tracker shows 30 inv_*.yaml files promoted but does not map the JSON batch Pass 3 files against compiled cards, signal intelligence, WHY authority, or prose. The research-to-runtime exploitation map does not yet exist. This is not a no-op.

overall_verdict: HARDENED — All five front-matter fields confirmed. change_type CONTENT is correct for a docs-only research mapping sprint. risk_level HIGH is a conservative over-classification but not a blocker — it appropriately gates the exploitation map behind GPT architectural review before batch promotions begin. All six prerequisites confirmed present on main. All eight first-authority documents confirmed present. Pass 3 corpus directly inspected: 10 JSON files in multi_llm_research/ confirmed real v3.0.0 investigation-spec content with hypotheses, supporting markers, and WHY/root-cause blocks. Translation tracker read in full — 30 inv_*.yaml specs all status: tested, establishing the single-spec promotion baseline. P1-7 readiness matrix estate finding confirmed ('research-rich but unevenly promoted'). Deliverable paths are clear, prohibited-file boundary is explicit, validation command is PowerShell-compatible. One HARDENING NOTE: Cursor must explicitly distinguish the true Pass 3 JSON files (multi_llm_research/) from the separate investigation-spec-collection-batch*.json artefacts and report both layers in corpus discovery. No STOP conditions triggered. Cursor may proceed under TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH governance.
